extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI Michal won from the break after UAE/Jumbo control relaxed post-40km, while POGACAR attacked 450m out to take 8 seconds from VINGEGAARD.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates controlled at 1-minute gap pre-40km mark, then inexplicably allowed gap to balloon to 4 minutes on final climb.
YATES Adam initiated GC accelerations on Grand Colombier climb, revealing UAE using both protected riders tactically not just POGACAR.
POGACAR launching attacks inside final 500m secures bonus seconds even without stage win, effective micro-tactic reducing GC gap methodically.

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: positive: dropped initially but bridged back to leaders with 10km remaining, demonstrating superior climbing recovery for a classics rider
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: initiated attacks on GC group climb before Pogacar moved, suggesting elevated protected status within UAE beyond typical domestique role
rider_signals.CALEBAZZO: negative: already at back of peloton 50km from finish on medium mountain stage, poor positioning discipline or form concern
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: positive: specifically mentioned for strong GC group performance, indicates genuine GC ambitions beyond typical one-week race focus
